ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country (in square kilometers) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pca_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCA score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "pca1" REAL /* First principal component score */,
  "pca2" REAL /* Second principal component score */,
  "pca3" REAL /* Third principal component score */,
  "pca4" REAL /* Fourth principal component score */,
  "pca5" REAL /* Fifth principal component score */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for PCA */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PCA scores were generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pca_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_mortality_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child mortality rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "child_mort_rate" REAL /* Child mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the child mortality rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_mortality_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export value entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "export_value" REAL /* Export value (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the export value data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare spending entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "health_spend" REAL /* Healthcare spending (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the healthcare spending data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_spending_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import value entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "import_value" REAL /* Import value (as a percentage of GDP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the import value data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Income level (GDP per capita, PPP, in thousands of current international dollars) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the income level data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_levels_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflation_rates" (
  "inflation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflation rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate (annual percentage change) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the inflation rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflation_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancies" (
  "life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the life expectancy data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total fertility rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_fertility" REAL /* Total fertility rate (live births per woman) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the total fertility rate data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_fertility_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capita" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP per capita entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdpp" REAL /* GDP per capita (current US$) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GDP per capita data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capita_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., country ID, metric ID) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
